name: Halsey Stevens
abstract: Halsey Stevens (December 3, 1908 – January 20, 1989) was a music professor, biographer, and composer of American music.

works_created.t: Like as the Culver on the Bared Bough
Venite, exultemus ("O come, let us sing unto the lord")
Sonatina for Bass Trombone and Piano

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Lloyd
about_quotes.evidence: Halsey Steven does, and he was also big in Ukrainian songs and stuff like that... But he told me that Bartok was using his folk themes even before I knew
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Lloyd — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Lloyd
about_quotes.evidence: I interviewed with Halsey Stevens, cause I wanted to study composition with him.
